Preferences: app_language (Enum: SYSTEM, EN, VI, ZH, JA, KO, FR, DE)

api_endpoints: OpenWeatherMap API for real-time weather data
business_rules: Long press clock / Tap weather: Open CarFloat settings
Tap WiFi/BT/GPS icons: Open corresponding System Settings
Live connectivity icons: Tinted white when active, dimmed when inactive
Individual widget toggles: Status and Assistant widgets can be hidden independently
Auto-boot support: Foreground service starts on RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED/LOCKED_BOOT_COMPLETED
features: Deep-linking to System Settings from Overlay
Stable Split-Screen via Proxy Activity & Reflection

patterns: Locale Override Pattern: Using `attachBaseContext` in Activity to apply custom Configuration with a custom Locale.
Trampoline/Proxy Activity pattern: Using a translucent activity to launch split-screen intents from a Service context.
Polling Service Pattern: Updating connectivity UI every 3 seconds via a Flow/Loop in the Foreground Service.
gotchas: Legacy Icon Support: Using mipmap-xhdpi PNGs for maximum compatibility on older Chinese Android Head Units.
Context Start Restrictions: Android 10+ restricts starting activities from background services without a visible window/proxy.
UI Recomposition on Locale Change: Activity.recreate() is necessary to force stringResource() to reload from different values-XX folders.
conventions: Every user-facing string MUST reside in strings.xml for i18n compatibility.
Connectivity icons use specific Off-variant icons (e.g., ic_wifi_off) when service is disabled.
